intro: Aeonium percarneum, also known as Aeonium 'Sun Up', is a succulent plant species belonging to the Crassulaceae family, native to the Canary Islands. Research suggests that this plant exhibits potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Aeonium percarneum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
